touches.ai_summary: Cold outreach to Elijah Lopez at VelocityHealth. Rep introduced AskElephant's call recording and coaching platform. Elijah expressed interest in improving their sales team's performance and agreed to a longer qualification call.

questions_asked.question: Are you currently using any call recording or sales coaching tools?
questions_asked.answer: We're using basic Zoom recordings but nothing structured for coaching.

questions_asked.question: What makes your platform different from Gong or Chorus?
questions_asked.answer: We focus on actionable coaching insights with AI-driven feedback loops, not just transcription and analytics.

next_steps: Schedule 30-minute qualification call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call with Elijah. Discussed VelocityHealth's 8-person sales team and challenges with inconsistent messaging and lack of coaching bandwidth. Elijah confirmed budget authority for tools under $10k annually. Identified call recording + coaching as primary use case.

questions_asked.question: How many sales reps would need access to the platform?
questions_asked.answer: We have 8 reps total, all would benefit from coaching.

questions_asked.question: What's your current process for coaching and QA on sales calls?
questions_asked.answer: Our sales manager tries to listen to a few calls each week but it's ad hoc and time-consuming.

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing CRM and calling tools?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we integrate with all major CRMs and support Zoom, Teams, and most dialers.

objections: We're a small team, so we need to make sure the ROI is clear before committing.
next_steps: Send case study showing coaching impact for similar-sized teams
Elijah to review internally and confirm interest in demo

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with case study on 10-person sales team achieving 23% win rate improvement after 90 days using AskElephant. Elijah responded positively, confirmed team is interested in moving forward with a demo.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Most customers are fully onboarded within 2 weeks, with initial value visible in the first week.

next_steps: Schedule product demo for following week

touches.ai_summary: Email confirming demo scheduled and asking Elijah if anyone else from leadership should join. Elijah confirmed he'll be the primary decision-maker and will loop in sales manager if needed after initial evaluation.
next_steps: Demo prep: focus on coaching workflows and automation features

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email after demo (conducted offline). Elijah confirmed positive feedback from sales manager who sat in. Requested pricing for 8 seats with unlimited automation tier. No mention of other stakeholders joining evaluation.

questions_asked.question: What's included in the unlimited automation tier vs. standard?
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited includes automated coaching scorecards, custom playbook enforcement, and AI-generated call summaries for every call.

next_steps: Send formal proposal with pricing breakdown

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Elijah. Walked through $9,000 list price for 8 seats on unlimited plan. Elijah expressed budget concern and asked if pricing could flex. Rep offered $7,100 ACV (21% discount) to close within quarter. Elijah seemed receptive but wanted to review internally.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the pricing? Our budget for new tools this quarter is tighter than expected.
questions_asked.answer: Let me see what we can do. If you're able to commit before month-end, I can get approval for $7,100 annually.

questions_asked.question: Is there anyone else who needs to sign off on this purchase?
questions_asked.answer: I have budget authority up to $10k, so I can approve this on my own.

objections: Pricing is higher than we initially planned to spend this quarter.
next_steps: Elijah to review discounted proposal with finance
Confirm contract terms and send redlined MSA if needed

touches.ai_summary: Pricing clarification call. Elijah confirmed the $7,100 pricing works but raised questions about contract length and auto-renewal terms. Rep explained standard 12-month term with 30-day cancellation notice. Elijah requested Net 45 payment terms instead of standard Net 30.

questions_asked.question: Can we do Net 45 payment terms instead of Net 30?
questions_asked.answer: I'll need to check with our finance team, but that's typically not an issue for deals in this range.

questions_asked.question: Are there any other blockers we should address before finalizing?
questions_asked.answer: No, just need to get the payment terms confirmed and then we're good to move forward.

next_steps: Confirm Net 45 payment terms with finance
Send updated contract with revised terms

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call to finalize contract terms. Rep confirmed Net 45 payment terms approved. Elijah raised last-minute concern about seat count, wondering if they could start with 5 seats and add more later. Rep explained pricing is more favorable at 8 seats and offered quarterly check-ins to adjust if needed. Elijah agreed to proceed with 8 seats.

questions_asked.question: What if we only need 5 seats to start—can we add more later without penalty?
questions_asked.answer: You can, but the per-seat pricing is better at 8. We can do quarterly check-ins and adjust the contract if your team size changes.

questions_asked.question: Does your legal team need to review the MSA, or are we good to proceed with signature?
questions_asked.answer: I can sign this myself—our legal team only reviews contracts over $25k.

questions_asked.question: When would onboarding start after we sign?
questions_asked.answer: We can kick off onboarding within 3 business days of signature. First training session usually happens within a week.

objections: Concerned about committing to 8 seats if the team might shrink in the next quarter.
next_steps: Send final contract with Net 45 terms for signature
Elijah to review and sign by end of week

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with final contract and DocuSign link. Elijah confirmed receipt and said he'll review and sign by Friday. Rep emphasized onboarding timeline and offered to answer any remaining questions before signature.
next_steps: Wait for signature by end of week
